lessons.title: The while Loop
lessons.description: Repeat code while a condition is true.

lessons.title: The do-while Loop
lessons.description: Execute code at least once, then repeat while condition is true.

lessons.title: The for Loop
lessons.description: A compact loop with initialization, condition, and increment.

lessons.title: The foreach Loop
lessons.description: Iterate over arrays and objects easily.

lessons.title: Break and Continue
lessons.description: Control loop execution: exit early or skip iterations.

lessons.title: Nested Loops and Best Practices
lessons.description: Loops inside loops, and how to avoid common pitfalls.
